creator: rene@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 197635
patch to update www/py-webassets

Update www/py-webassets to 0.12.1

I came across this update when trying out Pootle 2.8.2 which for some reason crashes in asset handling and thought this port might be the culprit, but it turned out innocent.

Anyway, the update is trivial.
